# Hello Gorgeous Med Spa
> Premier medical spa in Oswego, IL offering Botox, dermal fillers, medical weight loss, hormone therapy, and advanced skin treatments.

## About Us
Hello Gorgeous Med Spa is a boutique medical spa located at 74 W. Washington Street in Oswego, Illinois (60543). Founded by Danielle Alcala, we specialize in aesthetic medicine and wellness treatments. Our Medical Director is Ryan Kent, FNP-BC, who provides full prescriptive authority for medical treatments.

We serve clients from Naperville, Aurora, Plainfield, Yorkville, Montgomery, Sugar Grove, and throughout Kendall and Kane Counties. We are approximately 15-20 minutes from most western Chicago suburbs.

## Contact Information
- Address: 74 W. Washington Street, Oswego, IL 60543
- Phone: (630) 636-6193
- Website: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com
- Email: hello@hellogorgeousmedspa.com

## Hours of Operation
Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday: By appointment only
Sunday: Closed

## Services & Pricing

### Injectables
- **Botox**: $10 per unit. Most clients need 20-60 units. Used for forehead lines, crow's feet, frown lines (11s), lip flip, and more.
- **Dysport**: Alternative neuromodulator that may spread more and work faster (2-3 days onset vs 5-7 for Botox).
- **Jeuveau**: Modern neuromodulator also known as "Newtox."
- **Dermal Fillers**: Starting at $600/syringe. We offer Juvederm, Restylane, RHA, Sculptra, and Radiesse for lips, cheeks, jawline, under-eyes, and facial contouring.
- **Lip Filler**: Natural enhancement lasting 6-12 months.

### Medical Weight Loss
- **Semaglutide** (similar to Ozempic/Wegovy): Starting at $350/month. GLP-1 medication that helps patients lose 15-20% of body weight.
- **Tirzepatide** (similar to Mounjaro/Zepbound): Dual GLP-1/GIP medication with potentially greater weight loss (up to 22% of body weight).

### Hormone Therapy
- **BioTE Hormone Pellet Therapy**: For men and women. Pellets inserted every 3-6 months for steady hormone levels. Treats menopause, andropause, fatigue, weight gain, low libido.

### Advanced Skin Treatments
- **Morpheus8**: FDA-cleared RF microneedling that penetrates up to 8mm to tighten skin, reduce fat, and stimulate collagen. Treats jowls, acne scars, stretch marks, loose skin.
- **Quantum RF**: Minimally invasive subdermal radiofrequency for surgical-like skin tightening without surgery. Best for chin/neck, arms, abdomen, buttocks.
- **Solaria CO2 Laser**: Fractional CO2 laser for skin resurfacing, wrinkles, acne scars, sun damage. Gold standard with 5-7 days downtime.

### Wellness
- **IV Therapy**: Myers' Cocktail, immune boost, energy, hydration drips. Sessions 30-60 minutes.
- **PRF Hair Restoration**: Platelet-rich fibrin for natural hair growth stimulation.

### Additional Services
- Chemical peels
- HydraFacial
- Microneedling
- Laser hair removal
- PRP/PRF treatments
- Peptide therapy (BPC-157, Sermorelin)
- Prescription skincare (tretinoin, hydroquinone)
- Sexual wellness treatments

## Team
- **Danielle Alcala**: Owner and Lead Injector. Certified aesthetic specialist with extensive training.
- **Ryan Kent, FNP-BC**: Medical Director with full prescriptive authority for weight loss, hormone therapy, and medical treatments.

## Booking & Payment
- Free consultations available for most services
- Book online at hellogorgeousmedspa.com/book or call (630) 636-6193
- Same-day appointments often available
- Financing through Cherry, Affirm, and CareCredit (0% APR available)
- Accept HSA/FSA, all major credit cards, cash

## First-Time Client Offer
New clients receive a complimentary vitamin injection (B12, D3, Biotin, or Glutathione) valued at up to $65.

## VIP Membership
$49/month membership includes:
- 15% off all services
- Priority booking
- Exclusive promotions
- Monthly perks

## Rewards Programs
We participate in Allé (Allergan) and Aspire (Galderma) rewards programs for points on Botox, Juvederm, Dysport, and more.

## Reviews & Ratings
5-star rated on Google with 47+ reviews. Known for natural-looking results, personalized care, and luxury experience.

## Unique Differentiators
- One of few western suburb locations offering Morpheus8, Quantum RF, and Solaria CO2
- Botox at $10/unit (competitive pricing)
- Full prescriptive authority on-site
- Boutique, personalized experience (not a chain)
- Both aesthetic and medical wellness under one roof

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does Botox cost?
Botox is $10 per unit at Hello Gorgeous Med Spa. Most clients need 20-60 units depending on treatment areas.

### Do you offer Semaglutide for weight loss?
Yes. We offer compounded Semaglutide and Tirzepatide for medical weight loss starting at $350/month.

### What is Morpheus8?
Morpheus8 is RF microneedling that penetrates up to 8mm deep to tighten skin, reduce fat, and stimulate collagen.

### What is Quantum RF?
Quantum RF delivers radiofrequency energy beneath the skin for surgical-like skin tightening without surgery.

### Do you offer free consultations?
Yes, we offer complimentary consultations for most services.

### What areas do you serve?
We serve Oswego, Naperville, Aurora, Plainfield, Yorkville, Montgomery, and surrounding western Chicago suburbs.
